# Mission 30 - QC Boundary

## In Scope
- Create QC with status PASSED or FAILED only
- History QC_CHECK_CREATED
- Sync delivery control on QC result
- Optional service_operation_id validation

## Out of Scope
- No invoice
- No customer signature
- No customer portal
- No production deploy
- No silent QC pass (explicit form submit)

## Success Message
QC Check Created OK
